title: Jean-Claude Trichet's ECB Speeches
description: Between 2010 and 2011, Jean-Claude Trichet, President of the European Central Bank, delivered several speeches discussing the future of the eurozone. He emphasized the need for bold decisions to reform the Economic Monetary Union (EMU). Trichet's speeches were part of a broader effort by the ECB to address concerns about the euro's stability and the region's economic integration.
